basic_details.job_title: IIM Lucknow Research-Associate/Research-Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Management Lucknow (IIM Lucknow)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Management Lucknow (IIM Lucknow) Research-Associate/Research-Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on the official website iiml.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIM Lucknow Research-Associate/Research-Assistant Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Post-graduation from a reputed Institute/University in regular mode with minimum 60% marks., Ph.D. in management preferably in HRM/OB/psychology with a minimum 2 years of research experience (Research-Associate)., Post-graduation domain HRM/OB/Psychology or related subjects (Research-Assistant)., Desirable: Research publication in peer-reviewed ABDC/ABS-listed journal., Expertise in quantitative methods (SPSS, SmartPLS), qualitative research (NVivo).
qualification.details: Research-Associate: Ph.D. in management preferably in HRM/OB/psychology with a minimum of 2 years of research experience and post-graduation with 60% marks. Research-Assistant: Post-graduation in HRM/OB/Psychology or related subjects with 60% marks from a reputed institute/university in regular mode. Desirable: Research publications in peer-reviewed ABDC/ABS-listed journals. Expertise in quantitative methods (SPSS, SmartPLS) and qualitative research (NVivo).

selection_process: Scrutiny of applications Shortlisting Personal interview Document verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIM Lucknow Research-Associate/Research-Assistant Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Lucknow to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIM Lucknow Research-Associate/Research-Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the IIM Lucknow Research-Associate/Research-Assistant positions is 15th May 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the post of Research-Associate/Research-Assistant in the Indian Institute of Management Lucknow recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for Research-Associate?
faq.answer: For the Research-Associate position, candidates need to have a Ph.D. in management (preferably HRM/OB/psychology) with at least 2 years of research experience and a post-graduation degree with 60% marks.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for Research-Assistant?
faq.answer: For the Research-Assistant position, candidates must possess a post-graduation degree in HRM/OB/Psychology or related subjects with a minimum of 60% marks from a recognized institution in a regular mode.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for these positions?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Research-Associate/Research-Assistant posts will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 40,000/- to Rs. 65,000/-.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, as per the provided data, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the IIM Lucknow recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves scrutiny of applications, followed by shortlisting, a personal interview, and document verification.

faq.question: Q8. How can I apply for the Research-Associate/Research-Assistant posts?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online through the official website of IIM Lucknow or via the direct application link provided in the important links section before the last date.

faq.question: Q9. Are there any desirable qualifications mentioned?
faq.answer: Yes, desirable qualifications include research publications in peer-reviewed ABDC/ABS-listed journals and expertise in quantitative methods (SPSS, SmartPLS) and qualitative research (NVivo).

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the "Important Links" section of this article. It is advised to read it thoroughly before applying.
